products.name: Riso Carnaroli
pros: Italian excellence with large, tapered grains
Excellent absorption of sauces, ideal for risotto
Consistent al dente texture in all preparations

products.name: Riso Basmati
pros: Originates from India/Pakistan, adding exotic flavor
Suitable for a variety of dishes, from pilaf to salads

trustedSourceSummary: No official consumer documents were found in the last 60 days, so the latest available official sources from 2025-2026 were used. Organizations used: Altroconsumo. Altroconsumo’s November 2025 laboratory tests highlight Riso Carnaroli and Riso Basmati as top picks for their superior cooking qualities and flavor profiles.
